title: Market Research Lead (all genders)
required_skills: Substantial experience in market intelligence / competitive intelligence within biotech, pharma, or CRO/CDMO
Understanding of drug discovery and development value chain
Proficiency in CI tools (Evaluate, GlobalData, Pitchbook)
MBA or Master's in Business, Life Sciences, Economics (preferred)
Ability to influence senior stakeholders in global matrix environment
matched_skills: Competitive analysis and market intelligence (ECE Group, IPC roles from pdm CV)
Strategic thinking and portfolio gap analysis
missing_skills: Biotech/pharma/CRO industry experience — required, not in CV
'Substantial experience' at director/lead level — CV shows working student/manager roles
Market forecasting methodology at pharma scale
core_responsibilities: Define and execute Evotec's market intelligence strategy
Lead competitive analysis on therapeutic areas and competitor strategies
Translate market trends into strategic recommendations for portfolio and positioning
Partner with BD, Commercial Strategy, R&D and Operations
Deliver high-impact presentations and dashboards for senior stakeholders
recommended_emphasis: Power BI (PL-300) is a concrete BI platform match
Competitive analysis and market intelligence from pdm CV are structural matches
C-level stakeholder communication is a strong signal
Pharma/biotech industry gap is significant — no drug discovery context in CV
Position as analytical generalist with transferable CI methodology
